content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the diff across service.rs (69 lines changed) and project_run_record_test.rs (150 lines added). Changes add numbered list parsing, tighten subsection boundary detection, normalize colon-suffixed heading labels, and indent must-do scope body to prevent heading collisions with the validator. All 119 project_run_record tests pass. The logic is correct, well-tested, and addresses real parsing issues: (1) `## Non-goals:` headings now normalize correctly via `trim_end_matches(':')`, (2) numbered lists are parsed alongside bullet lists, (3) single-word labels like `Details:` no longer cause false subsection splits, (4) heading-like lines in must-do scope are indented to avoid validator collisions. No bugs, safety problems, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
